alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide was incorporated to achieve a final concentration of 11 mM
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide was incorporated to achieve a final concentration of 11 mM
cleavage agent: trypsin was added at a 1:50 ratio (protease: protein, w/w)
instrument: loaded into the Orbitrap Exploris 480 mass spectrometer for analysis
ionization type: injected into the nanospray flex (NSI) ion source for electrification
labeling: the proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium
reduction reagent: Dithiothreitol was added to a final concentration of 5 mM
reduction concentration: Dithiothreitol was added to a final concentration of 5 mM
